article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.3. Attachment 2 - Site Evaluation Table (Bike Learning Zone) 2026.01.27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Proposed Bike Learning Zone Site Selection for Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider a site evaluation for a new Bike Learning Zone (BLZ) — a dedicated area where children and youth can learn cycling skills. Six locations were scored; 7679 18th St ranked highest at 4.9 out of 5.
briefs.action_required: If your business is near any of the six evaluated sites, watch for the council decision on the chosen location.
